human_observations.overall_notes:
The generated diagnostic files look and sound broadly correct when compared with the source reference. No obvious corruption, clipping, channel failure, digital crackle, or blocking start/end transient was observed.

The diagnostic validates frozen motif identity, packet-level timing, exact rendering, channel routing, calibration, PCM16 export, and readback integrity.

Compared with the source reference, the generated material has less pronounced meso-scale clustering, recurring rhythmic packet groups, and dense-run/quiet-gap organisation. The source contains clearer grouped "hum–put put" rhythmic phrasing. This higher-order temporal organisation has not yet been explicitly implemented or qualified.

This is not an audio-integrity failure. It is a planning-model limitation that must be addressed before generating 25- or 45-minute Session 1 output.

limitations: Human listening is a diagnostic integrity check, not evidence of therapeutic efficacy.
Production readiness and safety certification were not established.
Twenty-five- and forty-five-minute durations were not validated.
Meso-scale cluster/rhythm organization remains unimplemented and unqualified.
